allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('applicationForm.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script>\\n'use strict'[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>/\);new Function\(m[0].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);console.log\('applicationForm script OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('index.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script>\\s*\\\(function\\\(\\\)\\{[\\s\\S]*?\\}\\\)\\\(\\\);\\s*<\\/script>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('script block not matched'\);process.exit\(1\);}new Function\(m[0].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);console.log\('welcome page JS OK'\);")
